title: Star of India
writer: Herbert Dalmas, Denis Freeman, John H. Kafka
actors: Cornel Wilde, Jean Wallace, Herbert Lom
plot: Squire Pierre St. Laurent returns from wars in India to 17th-century provincial France to find his estate confiscated by governor Narbonne, for back taxes, and resold to Katrina, a Dutch Countess. Katrina offers to return Pierre's...
